task: Look for the largest hunting land for auction in Kansas high plain region with mineral rights posted in the last seven days.
final_result_response:
## 🔍 Search Results: Largest Hunting Land for Auction in Kansas High Plains Region with Mineral Rights (Last 7 Days)

After navigating to LandWatch.com and applying all filters — **Kansas → High Plains Region → Hunting → Auction → Date Listed: Past 7 Days** — only **1 matching listing** was found that includes mineral rights:

| **Soils** | Class III Richfield silt loam, 0–1% slopes |
| **2026 CRP Payment** | Conveys to the Buyer |
| **Possession** | Immediate upon closing |

| **URL** | https://www.landwatch.com/stanton-county-kansas-farms-and-ranches-for-sale/pid/426034885 |

### 📝 Summary
This is the largest (and only) hunting land for auction in the Kansas High Plains Region with mineral rights posted in the last 7 days. The 160-acre CRP tract in Stanton County includes mineral rights (non-producing), provides steady CRP income of $4,728/year through 2030, and goes to private auction on **March 31, 2026**. Note: when the Mineral Rights URL filter was combined with all other filters simultaneously, LandWatch returned 0 results — the mineral rights detail was confirmed directly from the full listing description, which explicitly states "Minerals: Included although not producing."
